generated_oml:
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model representing structural dimensions of automotive vehicle using CAD software"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance DynamicBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to represent dynamic behavior of automotive vehicle under external forces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CADSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software used for structural modeling of automotive vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation engine for dynamic behavior analysis of automotive vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for parameter estimation through calibration of models with sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService, StateEstimationService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System for real-time safety and operational optimality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in automotive vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system health state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of system safety and operational optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemHealthInsight, SafetyViolationAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating physical twin behavior under current conditions using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for assessing system health through state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemHealthInsight
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing vehicle performance through optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight, PerformanceOptimizationAction
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights generated from simulation of Physical Twin behavior using sensor data and models"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying anomalies through fault detection algorithms"
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for system health assessment using state estimators"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing vehicle performance using optimizer algorithms"
]

instance SafetyViolationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action triggered by detected safety violations for adjustment of Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for adjusting vehicle parameters to optimize performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutomotiveVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheels, Chassis, StructuralElements
    base:desc "Operational environment for automotive vehicle in transportation domain"
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component of automotive vehicle responsible for movement and contact with road surface"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural framework of automotive vehicle supporting other components"
]

instance StructuralElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Key structural components of automotive vehicle including frame and body elements"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update cyber-physical system (CPS) and environmental model parameters using sensor-derived data, monitoring components to assess operational safety and optimality, and human or algorithmic intervention mechanisms for corrective actions upon violation detection, as described in Document 1 Figure 1."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a Raspberry Pi single-board computer for local control and data processing of the incubator system."
]
